key_themes: AI data center power demand and electrification tailwinds
Record order backlog growth (especially gas turbines and grid equipment)
Repeated analyst price target increases and Buy ratings
Strong momentum with all-time highs despite premium valuation
Positioning for energy transition, nuclear potential, and upcoming Q1 earnings
summary: GE Vernova (GEV) is seeing strongly positive financial sentiment, propelled by the explosive need for power infrastructure to support AI data centers and global electrification. The stock has surged more than 210% over the past year, repeatedly hitting all-time highs near $1,000, backed by massive order growth, a swelling backlog (gas turbines sold out years ahead), and near-constant analyst upgrades with price targets frequently raised to $1,000–$1,139.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/GEV/)[[2]](https://www.cnbc.com/quotes/GEV) While valuations are acknowledged as stretched (P/E ~55) and a minor offshore wind legal dispute exists, the dominant view across news, X, and investor forums is bullish on its secular growth runway ahead of Q1 2026 earnings on April 22.[[3]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/GEV/news/)[[4]](https://www.reddit.com/r/stocks/comments/1r8rz16/ge_vernova_gev_stock_analysis/)
sources: 30+ news articles and analyst reports (Yahoo Finance, TipRanks, Zacks, CNBC, Seeking Alpha), 25+ relevant X posts (mostly upgrades and momentum discussion), Multiple Reddit threads (r/stocks, r/ValueInvesting, r/investing)
